nasb.text: When Judah came to the lookout of the wilderness, they looked toward the multitude, and behold, they were corpses lying on the ground, and no one had escaped.

esv.text: When Judah came to the watchtower of the wilderness, they looked toward the horde, and behold, there were dead bodies lying on the ground; none had escaped.

cnv.text: 猶大人來到曠野的瞭望樓，向那大軍觀望，只見伏屍遍地，沒有一個逃脫的。

ccb.text: 犹大人来到旷野的瞭望塔俯瞰那支大军，发现敌军尸横遍野，无一幸免。
